description_long: This object is a modern toothbrush with a sleek, minimalist design, featuring a straight handle that gently curves near the head for ergonomic grip. The handle appears to be made of a single piece of dark-colored plastic, with a matte finish and no visible texturing or color accents. The head of the toothbrush is compact and oval-shaped, densely packed with short, uniform bristles arranged in several parallel rows. The bristles are also dark in color, matching the handle, and are cut flat across the top for even contact with surfaces. There are no visible logos, branding, or decorative elements on the handle or head. The overall appearance is utilitarian and functional, suitable for everyday personal care use.
description: A sleek, dark-colored toothbrush with a straight, ergonomic handle and a compact head densely packed with uniform bristles. The design is minimalist, with no visible branding or decorative features.
description_view_0: The toothbrush is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the handle and the oval shape of the bristle head.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the gentle curve in the handle and the flat, densely packed bristle arrangement on the head.
description_view_2: The back view displays the full length of the handle and the back of the head, with no visible bristle detail.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the handle's curve and the bristle profile.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: The bristles are arranged in several parallel rows, densely packed and cut flat across the top, with no visible variation in height or pattern.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is straight with a gentle ergonomic curve near the head, made of smooth plastic with a matte finish and no visible grip texture or color accents.
